cognitoMfaNotEnforced.^description: {$COUNT} Cognito user pool(s) do not enforce multi-factor authentication (MfaConfiguration is OFF or OPTIONAL). Without enforced MFA, credentials compromised via phishing or reuse are sufficient to sign in. Enforcing MFA is the single largest security lift Cognito offers.
cognitoMfaNotEnforced.shortDesc: Set MfaConfiguration=ON to require MFA on every sign-in

cognitoWeakPasswordPolicy.^description: {$COUNT} Cognito user pool(s) have a weak password policy (MinimumLength < 12, or one or more of RequireUppercase / RequireLowercase / RequireNumbers / RequireSymbols is false). Weak password policies materially reduce the cost of credential-stuffing and brute-force attacks.
cognitoWeakPasswordPolicy.shortDesc: Require length >= 12 and all four character classes

cognitoAdvancedSecurityNotEnforced.^description: {$COUNT} Cognito user pool(s) do not have advanced security in ENFORCED mode (UserPoolAddOns.AdvancedSecurityMode is missing, OFF, or AUDIT). Advanced security features (adaptive authentication, compromised-credential detection) only apply enforcement actions when the mode is ENFORCED.

cognitoDeletionProtectionDisabled.^description: {$COUNT} Cognito user pool(s) have DeletionProtection set to INACTIVE. A user pool can be deleted with a single API call in this state; the pool ID cannot be recreated and all users are lost.
cognitoDeletionProtectionDisabled.shortDesc: Enable DeletionProtection on every production user pool

cognitoNoEmailPhoneVerification.^description: {$COUNT} Cognito user pool(s) do not auto-verify email or phone (AutoVerifiedAttributes is empty). Without verification, an attacker can register an account claiming any email/phone and later use account-recovery flows on that unverified attribute.
cognitoNoEmailPhoneVerification.shortDesc: Auto-verify at least one of email / phone_number

cognitoNoLambdaTriggers.^description: {$COUNT} Cognito user pool(s) have no Lambda triggers configured (LambdaConfig is empty). Lambda triggers such as PreAuthentication / PostAuthentication / PreTokenGeneration are the only way to add custom auth-time telemetry, risk scoring, or claim customisation.
cognitoNoLambdaTriggers.shortDesc: Wire at least one Lambda trigger for auth observability or custom logic

cognitoAccountRecoveryNotConfigured.^description: {$COUNT} Cognito user pool(s) have no account-recovery mechanism configured (AccountRecoverySetting is missing or RecoveryMechanisms is empty). Users who lose credentials have no self-service reset path; every reset becomes a support ticket.
cognitoAccountRecoveryNotConfigured.shortDesc: Configure AccountRecoverySetting with at least one recovery mechanism

cognitoSingleRecoveryOption.^description: {$COUNT} Cognito user pool(s) have exactly one account-recovery mechanism configured. If that channel (e.g. the user's only email address) becomes unavailable, self-service recovery is blocked. A second mechanism provides a fall-back.
cognitoSingleRecoveryOption.shortDesc: Configure at least two recovery mechanisms with distinct priorities

cognitoUnusedUserPool.^description: {$COUNT} Cognito user pool(s) have zero users (EstimatedNumberOfUsers=0). Empty pools accumulate configuration drift and, on paid tiers (PLUS/ESSENTIALS), incur monthly fixed charges even with no active users.

cognitoTokenValidityTooLong.^description: {$COUNT} Cognito user pool(s) have at least one app client with long-lived tokens (AccessTokenValidity > 60 min, IdTokenValidity > 60 min, or RefreshTokenValidity > 30 days). Long-lived tokens increase the window during which a stolen token remains valid.

cognitoDeviceTrackingDisabled.^description: {$COUNT} Cognito user pool(s) have device tracking disabled (DeviceConfiguration is missing, or ChallengeRequiredOnNewDevice is false). Device tracking enables 'remembered-device' MFA suppression and detection of sign-ins from unknown devices.

cognitoResourcesWithoutTags.^description: {$COUNT} Cognito user pool(s) have no tags applied. Tags enable cost allocation, tag-based IAM policies, and lifecycle governance.
cognitoResourcesWithoutTags.shortDesc: Tag every user pool (owner, environment, cost-centre)
